HGSS.676.0001:
Huh? Is that thing a Pokédex? Have you
met Professor Oak?\f
Huh? You have?
That’s way cool!\f
I have a dream of becoming a Pokémon
researcher like Professor Oak.\f
May I please have your phone number?\f
We should chat about Professor Oak.\f
I’m sure it will be loads of fun! [0200,0000]
HGSS.676.0002:
You must listen to Professor Oak’s
Pokémon Talk, right?
HGSS.676.0003:
Oh... I wish I had a chance to meet
Professor Oak...
HGSS.676.0004:
May I please have your phone number?\f
We should chat about Professor
Oak. It will be loads of fun! [0200,0000]
HGSS.676.0005:
Huh?
Wait, aren’t you nearby?\r
Do you like the phone that much?
HGSS.676.0006:
I recently began observing wild
[0100,000A,0000].\f
I’ve been learning all sorts of new
things through my observations.\f
I wish I could become a Pokémon
researcher like Professor Oak soon.\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0007:
Oh yes, I managed to knock out a wild
[0100,000B,0000] a while back.\f
Well, considering all the Pokémon
studying I do every day,\r
it was inevitable.\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0008:
Oh yes, I came close to catching
a wild [0100,000B,0000], but it got away.\f
For the longest time, I’ve been wanting
to observe [0100,000B,0000]. Man...\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0009:
Do you know Blue?\f
He’s Professor Oak’s grandson and a
former Pokémon League Champion!\r
He’s one super Pokémon Trainer!\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0010:
Professor Oak has a granddaughter
named Daisy.\f
When she’s around, even the most
ferocious Pokémon calm right down.\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0011:
Everyone’s talking about
Professor Elm.\f
He used to be an assistant to the great
Professor Oak!\f
That is so cool! I envy him!\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0012:
Professor Oak’s dream is to compile a
comprehensive Pokédex.\f
I envy you for taking part in that
project...\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0013:
Do you know Kurt, the Poké Ball
creator?\f
He and Professor Oak go back a long
way. I guess great people attract\r
one another!\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0014:
The Pokémon League is the great
gathering place for all Trainers who\r
wish to become the Champion.\f
Professor Oak acts as an advisor to
the Pokémon League’s headquarters.\f
He really is a great man.\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0015:
Professor Oak’s Pokémon Talk is a
popular radio show, right?\f
Did you know that he was going to turn
down the show at first?\f
But Mary’s energy and persistence wore
him down.\r
So we have Mary to thank for it!\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0016:
Professor Oak used to be a Trainer a
long time ago.\f
But rather than battling, he found
Pokémon themselves to be interesting.\f
So he abandoned his training to focus
on becoming a researcher.\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0017:
Professor Oak has a granddaughter
named Daisy.\f
She has tea every day for an hour from
three in the afternoon.\f
I wish I could join her for tea and chat
about Professor Oak.\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0018:
Did you know?
Professor Oak traveled all over the\r
world when he was young.\f
While traveling, he must’ve learned
about Pokémon naturally.\f
I envy him... I’d like to travel and
learn about things, too...\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0019:
Did you know?
Professor Oak traveled all over the\r
world when he was young.\f
While traveling, he must’ve learned
about Pokémon naturally.\f
I envy him... I’d like to travel and
learn about things, too...\f
See you later!
HGSS.676.0020:
Want to battle?\f
I have to battle every so often to
avoid getting rusty.\f
I’ll be on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.676.0021:
Do you remember about our battle?\f
The place is [0104,0003,0000].
Hurry over--I’m waiting.
HGSS.676.0022:
I’m going to study all about Pokémon so
that Professor Oak will make me his\r
assistant!
